messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-480 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-480" (or "reject BL-480 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The Approvals-topic ask must carry enough ticket meat to decide: title + what-it-solves + acceptance signal, not a bare 'BL-XXX needs your approval'
What it solves: THE DEFECT. approvalRequestedText (extension/src/concierge/topicRouter.ts, ~line 122) renders an
ApprovalRequested event as ONLY the ticket id plus the reply grammar. The human is being asked to make
a real decision (approve a spec / a governance change) from a message that carries zero content abo…
How it works: An ApprovalRequested post carries the ticket title and a bounded summary alongside the id

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-480 - The Approvals-topic ask must carry enough ticket meat to decide: title + what-it-solves + acceptance signal, not a bare 'BL-XXX needs your approval' is complete.
